requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 (Francophone IEC Alignment)
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（法语国家IEC体系对齐）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（法語國家IEC體系對齊）

summary.en: Burkina Faso, as a Francophone West African country with standards alignment through ABNORM (Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité), adopts IEC standards as the technical reference framework. For EV charging, this means the IEC 62196 connector ecosystem: IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2) for DC fast charging. This alignment follows the broader pattern of Francophone Africa adopting IEC and CENELEC-derived standards through national standardisation bodies affiliated with ISO and IEC. ABNORM coordinates Burkina Faso's standards adoption and is affiliated with ISO and IEC. Connector requirements for any specific project or EVSE installation should be confirmed with ABNORM, ARSE, and the project owner or operator, as Burkina Faso has no published mandatory EVSE connector regulation confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14.
summary.zh: 布基纳法索作为法语西非国家，通过ABNORM（Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité，布基纳法索标准化、计量与质量局）实现标准对接，采用IEC标准作为技术参考框架。在电动汽车充电领域，这意味着采用IEC 62196接口体系：交流充电使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）接口，直流快充使用IEC 62196-3联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。这一对接遵循法语非洲国家通过隶属ISO和IEC的国家标准化机构采纳IEC及CENELEC标准的普遍模式。ABNORM负责协调布基纳法索的标准采纳，隶属ISO和IEC。具体项目或EVSE安装的接口要求须与ABNORM、ARSE及项目业主或运营商确认，截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认布基纳法索已发布适用于EVSE接口的强制法规。
summary.zht: 布吉納法索作為法語西非國家，通過ABNORM（Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité，布吉納法索標準化、計量與質量局）實現標準對接，採用IEC標準作為技術參考框架。在電動汽車充電領域，這意味著採用IEC 62196接口體系：交流充電使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）接口，直流快充使用IEC 62196-3聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。這一對接遵循法語非洲國家通過隸屬ISO和IEC的國家標準化機構採納IEC及CENELEC標準的普遍模式。ABNORM負責協調布吉納法索的標準採納，隸屬ISO和IEC。具體項目或EVSE安裝的接口要求須與ABNORM、ARSE及項目業主或運營商確認，截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認布吉納法索已發布適用於EVSE接口的強制法規。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories (Type 2 / Mennekes)
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers (CCS2 / Configuration FF)
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
ABNORM (Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité) — Burkina Faso national standards body, IEC member

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. The GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a superficially similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2 but differs in connector gender (GB/T uses a male plug at the charger and female vehicle inlet, the reverse of Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact pin arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. The GB/T 20234.3 DC coupler is geometrically different from CCS2 and uses a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus communication per GB/T 27930, which is incompatible with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack used with CCS2. Adapters between GB/T and IEC 62196 systems are not an accepted engineering solution for project-compliant EVSE installations.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器与IEC 62196 Type 2在外形上有表面相似之处，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点引脚排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2所用的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。GB/T与IEC 62196系统之间的转接器不是项目合规EVSE安装可接受的工程解决方案。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器與IEC 62196 Type 2在外形上有表面相似之處，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點引腳排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2所用的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。GB/T與IEC 62196系統之間的轉接器不是項目合規EVSE安裝可接受的工程解決方案。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 deployments in Burkina Faso. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for CCS2), temperature-rise and mechanical test evidence for the new coupler, updated labels and documentation in French and English, and a spare-part strategy compatible with the IEC 62196 ecosystem. Given that Burkina Faso's 4-wheel EV fleet is extremely small as of 2026, connector compatibility must also be assessed against the actual vehicles present in-country or planned for the specific project — most of which are likely to have IEC 62196 Type 2 AC inlets if they are European-sourced EVs.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于布基纳法索IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（CCS2须从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）进行硬件重新设计，并须提供新耦合器的温升和机械测试证据、更新法语和英语标签及文件，以及与IEC 62196体系兼容的备件策略。鉴于截至2026年布基纳法索四轮电动汽车保有量极少，接口兼容性还须结合国内实际车辆或特定项目计划车辆进行评估——若为欧洲来源电动汽车，交流接口很可能为IEC 62196 Type 2。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於布吉納法索IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（CCS2須從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）進行硬體重新設計，並須提供新耦合器的溫升和機械測試證據、更新法語和英語標籤及文件，以及與IEC 62196體系兼容的備件策略。鑒於截至2026年布吉納法索四輪電動汽車保有量極少，接口兼容性還須結合國內實際車輛或特定項目計劃車輛進行評估——若為歐洲來源電動汽車，交流接口很可能為IEC 62196 Type 2。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by the project specification, ABNORM standard reference, or vehicle-fleet compatibility; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign; no single published EVSE mandatory connector regulation confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Burkina Faso's IEC alignment as a Francophone country means IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connectors are the applicable technical reference for EV charging. GB/T connectors are physically and electrically incompatible with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets. Hardware redesign, not adapters, is required. Confirm vehicle fleet and project connector requirements with ABNORM and ARSE before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 布基纳法索作为法语国家的IEC对接意味着IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口是电动汽车充电的适用技术参考。GB/T接口与IEC 62196车辆接口在物理和电气层面不兼容。须进行硬件重新设计，而非使用转接器。在报价或发货前，须向ABNORM和ARSE确认车辆保有量和项目接口要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 布吉納法索作為法語國家的IEC對接意味著IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口是電動汽車充電的適用技術參考。GB/T接口與IEC 62196車輛接口在物理和電氣層面不兼容。須進行硬體重新設計，而非使用轉接器。在報價或發貨前，須向ABNORM和ARSE確認車輛保有量和項目接口要求。
